basic_details.job_title: IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF-JRF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT ISM Dhanbad) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 ANRF-JRF Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT ISM Dhanbad website. The last date to submit the application form is 04-08-2026. In this article, you'll find the ANRF-JRF recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application steps, and direct links to the official notification and application form.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation will be provided as per norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate (or higher) degree in Electrical Engineering or areas relevant to Electrical Engineering selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, etc. First class or equivalent in all academic qualifications from UG degree onwards.
qualification.details: Postgraduate (or higher) degree in Electrical Engineering or areas relevant to Electrical Engineering selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UGC NET including lectureship (Assistant Professorship) and GATE or National level examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER, etc. First class or equivalent in all academic qualifications from UG degree onwards.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT ISM Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF-JRF Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF-JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF-JRF recruitment is 04 August 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the ANRF-JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate (or higher) degree in Electrical Engineering or related fields, with a first-class or equivalent in all academic qualifications from the UG degree onwards. They must also have qualified through CSIR-UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the ANRF-JRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the ANRF-JRF position is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the ANRF-JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37000.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the ANRF-JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ANRF-JRF position will involve an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the IIT ISM Dhanbad ANRF-JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for General/OBC categories in the official notification. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific details regarding fees for other categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the ANRF-JRF post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the ANRF-JRF post at IIT ISM Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. In which city is IIT ISM Dhanbad located?
faq.answer: IIT ISM Dhanbad is located in Dhanbad, Jharkhand.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ANRF/ARG/2025/005651/ENS.
